summary: See clues file for full details. 7 tossups, 12 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 7 tossups and 12 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: In a discussion of this painter, Pierre-Jean Mariette remarked that his "impetuous genius ... was such that he almost never made drawings for his paintings", although others criticised his inconsistency with a common joke being that he had three pencils; one made of gold, one of silver and one of iron.
examples: In a discussion of this painter, Pierre-Jean Mariette remarked that his "impetuous genius ... was such that he almost never made drawings for his paintings", although others criticised his inconsistency with a common joke being that he had three pencils; one made of gold, one of silver and one of iron.

clues.clue: This painter gained a commission to redecorate a palace after the original winner, Veronese was unable to complete it.
examples: This painter gained a commission to redecorate a palace after the original winner, Veronese was unable to complete it.

clues.clue: That painting by this painter depicts the last judgement as well as iconography from the annunciation and measures (*) 23 by 72 feet.
examples: That painting by this painter depicts the last judgement as well as iconography from the annunciation and measures (*) 23 by 72 feet.

clues.clue: This painter was a student of Titian but was thrown out of his studio after just three days either due to a personality clash or because Titian was jealous of this painter's talent.
examples: This painter was a student of Titian but was thrown out of his studio after just three days either due to a personality clash or because Titian was jealous of this painter's talent.

clues.clue: This painter's nickname derives from the fact that his father was a silk dyer.
examples: This painter's nickname derives from the fact that his father was a silk dyer.

clues.clue: In a painting by this artist, a ring of dark, translucent clouds surrounds a figure glowing in pink at the top of a very long staircase, where angels ascend and descend.
examples: In a painting by this artist, a ring of dark, translucent clouds surrounds a figure glowing in pink at the top of a very long staircase, where angels ascend and descend.

clues.clue: In another painting by this artist, the head of a figure leaning to her right casts a shadow on her face and chest, making a line that points to Christ.
examples: In another painting by this artist, the head of a figure leaning to her right casts a shadow on her face and chest, making a line that points to Christ.

clues.clue: An angel casts light on the center while figures in shadow are attacked by snakes in this artist's Miracle of the (+) Bronze Serpent, which he painted for the Scuola di San Rocco.
examples: An angel casts light on the center while figures in shadow are attacked by snakes in this artist's Miracle of the (+) Bronze Serpent, which he painted for the Scuola di San Rocco.

clues.clue: Mary intercedes before Christ in the Empyrean in an extremely-crowded painting by this artist in the Doge's Palace.
examples: Mary intercedes before Christ in the Empyrean in an extremely-crowded painting by this artist in the Doge's Palace.

clues.clue: In the last year of his life, this artist painted a work for the church of San Giorgio Maggiore that is lit by only two light sources: Christ's bright halo and a hanging (*) oil lamp surrounded by ghostly, translucent angels.
examples: In the last year of his life, this artist painted a work for the church of San Giorgio Maggiore that is lit by only two light sources: Christ's bright halo and a hanging (*) oil lamp surrounded by ghostly, translucent angels.

clues.clue: Jean-Paul Sartre, a great admirer of this artist, called him "the first film director".
examples: Jean-Paul Sartre, a great admirer of this artist, called him "the first film director".

clues.clue: Edouard Manet  made a copy of this artist's Self-Portrait as an Old Man, in which this man's great grey-bearded face sharply contrasts with his dark fur robe and the black background.
examples: Edouard Manet  made a copy of this artist's Self-Portrait as an Old Man, in which this man's great grey-bearded face sharply contrasts with his dark fur robe and the black background.
